content:
Now, go back and read all of your Weekly Writing Warm-up entries from the past six weeks. What do you notice about your entries? Do you see improvements? What are they? What benefit has this ongoing assignment given you during this class?

Save your completed Week 6 Weekly Writing Warm-Up using the proper naming convention.
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 5 minutes.

Completion
The naming convention is ENG101_wk#_warm_up_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk6_warm_up_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
Submit the Week 6 Weekly Writing Warm-Up by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.



After you submit your assignment, click Next to complete the Week 6 Discussion.


Points
100
Submitting
a text entry box or a file upload
Due For Available from Until
Mar 5Mar 5 at 11:59pm Everyone -N/A -N/A
